summary: Initial baseline research, captured from the conversation that built mck-scaffold v0.1.0 through v0.10.1. Synthesized into Wasowski-2026 + Piskala-2026 framework. Dogfood run on consultant-helper (2026-05-15) immediately surfaced Spec-Kit drift (--ai deprecated, slash commands dot->hyphen, commands moved to skills); these findings are captured in streams/github-landscape.md and reflected in routing.md / L1-spec-kit templates.

known_drifts_since_last_run.detail: --ai deprecated; use --integration. Slash commands /speckit.X -> /speckit-X. Commands moved from .claude/commands/ to .claude/skills/. Auto-git-init now default.
